info.description: Every editable bit of the homepage. Fields are grouped top-to-bottom in the order they appear on the live site. Leave any field blank to use the default.

issueLine.description: The small grey line at the very top of the homepage. e.g. 'Issue No. 01 · Summer 2026'.

insideThisIssueLine.description: The italic line right below the issue number.

heroKicker.description: HERO SECTION — Small uppercase label above the hero title (e.g. 'Reset Stories').

heroTitle.description: HERO SECTION — The big title on the left side of the homepage hero.

heroBody.default: What does it actually feel like to live in full alignment with who you are? Not the managed version. Not the performing one. The whole one. We are exploring that here, through honest stories, real practices, and a life beautifully lived.
heroBody.description: HERO SECTION — The 3-4 line paragraph below the hero title.

heroCtaPrimaryLabel.description: HERO SECTION — First button text (plum colour).

heroCtaPrimaryUrl.description: HERO SECTION — Where the first button links to. Use full URL or path starting with /.

heroCtaSecondaryLabel.description: HERO SECTION — Second button text (pink colour).

heroCtaSecondaryUrl.description: HERO SECTION — Where the second button links to.

heroImage.description: HERO SECTION — Image on the right side of the hero. Portrait orientation works best.

featuredFallbackTitle.default: You are not overwhelmed. You are holding everything.
featuredFallbackTitle.description: FEATURED STORY FALLBACK — Only shows if there is no real featured article. The featured article (if you mark one as 'isFeatured') will override this.

featuredFallbackAuthor.description: FEATURED STORY FALLBACK — Author name when no real featured article exists.

featuredFallbackReadingTime.description: FEATURED STORY FALLBACK — e.g. '6 min read'.

featuredFallbackExcerpt.description: FEATURED STORY FALLBACK — The article excerpt shown on homepage when no real article is marked featured.

mantra1.default: You don't have to hold all of this. Come back to yourself.
mantra1.description: MANTRA STRIP — A single calming line between Featured Story and Quote 1.

quote1Text.default: Maybe the next level isn't about managing everything more gracefully. Maybe it's about not gripping so tightly in the first place.
quote1Text.description: QUOTE 1 — The first pull-quote on the homepage.

quote1Attribution.description: QUOTE 1 — Attribution line below the quote.

workBody1.default: Most people arrive here after trying everything else. The therapy. The journalling. The courses. The spiritual work. Getting all the way to the insight, and then hitting the same wall. This work meets you in the body, where the patterns actually live.

workBody2.default: The Signal Method™ is the umbrella for all the coaching work here. Underneath it sit the programmes, each designed for a different stage of the journey.

workCtaPrimaryLabel.default: Start with the free Nervous System Decoder

workCtaPrimaryUrl.description: WORK SECTION — Where primary button links to.

workCtaSecondaryLabel.default: Explore all the ways to work

workCtaSecondaryUrl.description: WORK SECTION — Where secondary button links to.

workImage.description: WORK SECTION — Image on the right side. Portrait orientation works best.

exploreLifeBody.default: Rituals and energy, home and space, style and beauty, food and nourishment, weekend finds.
exploreLifeBody.description: EXPLORE SECTION — Body under the 'Life' tile (yellow).

exploreLoveBody.default: Dating and patterns, breakups and reset, friendship, motherhood, self worth and identity.
exploreLoveBody.description: EXPLORE SECTION — Body under the 'Love & Relationships' tile (pink).

exploreWorkBody.default: Founder reset, burnout and nervous system, Signal Method™, career and direction, money and worth.
exploreWorkBody.description: EXPLORE SECTION — Body under the 'Work & Money' tile (gold).

quote2Text.default: Your inner guidance system was never broken. It was waiting for you to stop overriding it.

experiencesBody.default: Group sessions held on the houseboat at Taggs Island, online, and in corporate spaces. A few times a year, a small group comes to the island for a full reset day. Water outside, no agenda, just space to come back to yourself.

newsletterTitle.default: A letter, every week, that feels like coming home.

newsletterBody.default: Honest, beautiful writing about your inner world, jewellery with meaning, houseboat life, and what it actually feels like to return to yourself.

newsletterFreeTierLabel.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Label for the free tier card.

newsletterFreeTierBody.default: One letter a month. The last Friday digest with a personal note from Anna.
newsletterFreeTierBody.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Description for the free tier.

newsletterPlusTierLabel.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Label for the plus tier card.

newsletterPlusTierBody.default: Everything weekly. Full Sunday Cosmic Forecast, Wednesday Signal Check, Friday ESJ Drop, monthly Reset Story, full archive, early event access.
newsletterPlusTierBody.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Description for the plus tier.

newsletterCtaUrl.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Where button links to (usually Substack URL).

newsletterMicrocopy.default: No spam. Honest writing. Cancel any time.
newsletterMicrocopy.description: NEWSLETTER SECTION — Small fineprint below the button.

shopTitle.default: Jewellery with meaning. Made to be worn.

shopBody.default: I have been designing jewellery for over twenty-five years. What I have learned, across all of that, is that the pieces that actually matter are not the most expensive ones. They are the ones you reach for in hard moments. The ones that remind you.

shopProduct1Hook.default: I reach for this one when I need to remember what is underneath the noise
shopProduct1Hook.description: SHOP SECTION — Italic hook above product 1.

shopProduct2Hook.default: For the days my mind is doing too much and I need clarity not calm
shopProduct2Hook.description: SHOP SECTION — Italic hook above product 2.

shopProduct3Hook.default: The word you keep coming back to, worn close to your throat
shopProduct3Hook.description: SHOP SECTION — Italic hook above product 3.

mediaTile1Title.default: Come Back to Yourself — daily mantras and practices.

mediaTile1Meta.description: MEDIA HUB — Tile 1 small meta line.

mediaTile2Title.default: The Reset with Anna Lou — honest conversations about the inner world.

mediaTile2Meta.description: MEDIA HUB — Tile 2 small meta line.

mediaTile3Title.default: Reset Letters — weekly writing that feels like coming home.

mediaTile3Meta.description: MEDIA HUB — Tile 3 small meta line.

quote3Text.default: The feeling itself moves through in ninety seconds if you let it. Nine years of running from ninety seconds of feeling is an extraordinary amount of cardio.

communityBody1.default: Every Tuesday I hold a circle at The Hare and the Moon, Twickenham. Donation-based. No agenda except being in the room together. Connection is not a concept. It is biological.

communityBody2.default: The Returning Circle runs every week without exception. No waitlist needed. Come on Tuesday.

communityBody3.default: A few times a year, a small group comes to Taggs Island, Hampton for a full reset day. Water outside, no agenda, just space to come back to yourself.

communityImage.description: COMMUNITY SECTION — Image on the left side. Landscape orientation works best.

portraitBody.default: From the first piece about someone selling handmade jewellery on Portobello Road, to the Drapers feature when the brand hit Harrods, Selfridges, and Harvey Nichols simultaneously, to QVC Japan appearances, to trade press coverage across two decades. For most of those years the press was about the brand and the jewellery. More recently the coverage has shifted. The coaching, the houseboat, the pivot.

portraitImage.description: ABOUT STRIP — Portrait photo of Anna. Portrait orientation works best.
